profile_text:
PROVIDER PROFILE: AINIA
Category: AI & Product Quality
Solutions: SaaS NPD platform (New Product Development), Termoseal (thermal vision for seal defect detection), predictive models, NIR spectroscopy, SKINSPECTOR (collaborative robotics + spectral vision + AI for skin evaluation).
Use cases: Innovation pipeline management, real-time product characterisation, seal defect detection on production lines, evaluation of cosmetic treatment efficacy on skin.
Target company size: Medium to large (sufficient R&D and production volume to justify SaaS investment)
Required digital maturity: Medium — requires structured data from production and R&D processes.
Integration: Compatible with existing laboratory and production environments; SKINSPECTOR is standalone hardware.
Estimated investment: Medium (SaaS subscription model for NPD; hardware investment for SKINSPECTOR).
Certifications: N/E
Contact: carlos.fernandez@ainia.es | +34 695 20 23 50 | https://www.ainia.com/
Key differentiator: Unique combination of collaborative robotics, spectral vision and AI for extreme precision in skin and product characterisation. First methodology specifically validated for cosmetic water footprint calculation.

PROVIDER PROFILE: HI IBERIA
Category: AI & Digitalisation — Fragrance and Formulation
Solutions: FragIA platform — RAG models + biochemical simulations + NLP for fragrance and cosmetic formulation. Virtual assistants (conversational AI). Generative AI simulations for new material design.
Use cases: Virtual exploration and validation of ingredient combinations (reduces physical trials), personalised biological formulation, real-time adaptation of formulations to market trends via social media and consumer review analysis, technical conversational support for R&D teams.
Target company size: Any size — especially relevant for companies seeking to accelerate R&D and reduce time-to-market.
Required digital maturity: Medium — requires digitised formulation records and willingness to integrate AI in the creative process.
Integration: ERP, SCADA, LIMS.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Roberto Gómez-Espinosa Martín | robertogemartin@hi-iberia.es | +34 91 458 51 19
Key differentiator: Reuse of historical organisational knowledge via RAG + explainable AI for perfumers and formulators without limiting artistic freedom. Validated in NANOMATIA, R3POWER and SMART MATERIAL innovation projects.

PROVIDER PROFILE: INNOCV SOLUTIONS
Category: AI & Automation — Customer Service and Document Management
Solutions: GPT-based chatbots, document automation (OCR), ETL pipelines, semantic search, facial interpretation systems.
Use cases: 24/7 e-commerce customer support, invoice and document digitalisation, creation of a Single Point of Truth for corporate data, automated contract review.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: CRM, ERP, MES.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Álvaro Sánchez | alvaro.sanchez@innocv.com | +34 680 139 778
Key differentiator: Over 30 years of experience. Semantic and facial interpretation search capabilities. Strong background in document-heavy regulated environments.

PROVIDER PROFILE: ITELLIGENT
Category: Big Data & AI — Revenue Management and Pricing
Solutions: Cloud-scale data processing, RPA (Robotic Process Automation), NLP, intelligent revenue management, dynamic pricing optimisation for perfumery and cosmetics retail.
Use cases: Demand forecasting, intelligent price optimisation for cosmetics and perfumery retail, large-scale data analytics, process automation.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: N/E
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Belén Albarracín | balbarracin@itelligent.es | +34 622 490 447
Key differentiator: Pioneers in data analytics in Spain since 2008. Deep sector-specific experience in cosmetics and perfumery pricing intelligence.

PROVIDER PROFILE: KEYBOTIC
Category: Industrial Robotics & AI — Predictive Maintenance
Solutions: Keyper — autonomous quadruped robot for industrial environments. Capabilities: 3D mapping, thermal anomaly detection, gas leak detection, real-time alert system.
Use cases: Predictive maintenance in production facilities, autonomous plant inspection, detection of leaks and thermal anomalies in water and energy systems, safety monitoring in restricted areas.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: N/E
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Mireia Riera | mireia.riera@keybotic.com | 614 344 811
Key differentiator: 100% in-house design and manufacturing in Spain. Real-time alerts. Operates in environments inaccessible or dangerous for human inspection.

PROVIDER PROFILE: NEKTIU & DataAI
Category: Automation & AI — Supply Chain and Operations
Solutions: RPA, Low-Code platforms, Generative AI, APS (Advanced Planning & Scheduling) systems, demand prediction models, stock optimisation.
Use cases: Supply chain automation, demand forecasting, inventory control, ERP/MES/CRM integration, serverless cloud architecture for industrial operations.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: ERP, MES, CRM (AWS Serverless architecture).
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Alberto de Torres | adetorres@nektiu.com | 670 788 782
Key differentiator: 100% Cloud solution, modular, no proprietary servers, no complex custom code required. Rapid deployment from POC to production.

PROVIDER PROFILE: OGA.ai
Category: AI for Chemical Formulation
Solutions: oga.Alchemy SaaS platform — AI-driven formulation optimisation for cosmetics, chemistry, and personal care. Formula replication and reverse engineering.
Use cases: Optimisation of cosmetic and chemical formulations, reduction of trial-and-error in laboratory, formula replication from target specifications, accelerated ingredient substitution.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: ERP, LIMS.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Manuel Miranda | manuel.miranda@oga.ai | +34 667 413 340
Key differentiator: Specifically designed to eliminate laboratory trial-and-error dependency. Validated for cosmetics sector formulation workflows.

PROVIDER PROFILE: SIGILLUM KS
Category: Regulatory Compliance — Cosmetics and Personal Care
Solutions: SIG_COMPLY platform — automated toxicological validation, formula review against current EU cosmetics regulation (Regulation EC 1223/2009), ingredient compliance checking.
Use cases: Automated validation of cosmetic formulas against regulatory requirements, elimination of manual compliance errors, accelerated time-to-market for new product launches, regulatory submission support.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: ERP, formulation management systems.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: ISO 9001
Contact: Sebastián Cabo | sebastian.cabo@sigillumks.com | +34 881 906 781
Key differentiator: High reliability through automated elimination of manual validation errors. Specific expertise in EU cosmetics regulatory framework.

PROVIDER PROFILE: TECNALIA
Category: Predictive Analytics & AI for Manufacturing
Solutions: Custom Machine Learning and Deep Learning models for industrial processes. Solutions for process optimisation, failure prevention, and cosmetics personalisation.
Use cases: Production process optimisation, predictive maintenance and failure prevention, personalised cosmetics formulation using consumer data, quality control via predictive models.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: N/E
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: N/E
Key differentiator: AI adapted specifically to the productive business context — not generic models. Technology centre with broad industrial research background.

PROVIDER PROFILE: VICOMTECH
Category: NLP & Visual Computing
Solutions: Natural language processing, voice recognition, visual computing, on-premise LLM deployment (private ChatGPT equivalent), automated data summarisation, automated quality control.
Use cases: On-premise conversational AI for sensitive corporate data, automated summarisation of regulatory documents, voice-controlled manufacturing operations, automated visual inspection.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: Hybrid integration with business rules and LLMs.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Dra. Maria Teresa Linaza | mtlinaza@vicomtech.org | 943 309 230
Key differentiator: Proprietary technology backed by 250+ researchers. On-premise deployment ensures data sovereignty — particularly relevant for companies with sensitive formulation or customer data.

PROVIDER PROFILE: XITASO IBERIA
Category: Generative AI & Digital Product Passport
Solutions: Digital Product Passport (DPP) implementation, structuring and homogenisation of heterogeneous data sources (PDF, Excel, databases), Industry 4.0 consulting, IoT integration, digital twins, augmented reality.
Use cases: EU Digital Product Passport compliance (upcoming regulation), heterogeneous data integration for sustainability reporting, IoT-connected manufacturing optimisation, digital twin for production simulation, cybersecurity consulting and auditing (RGPD, NIS2, IEC 62443).
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: ERP, internal databases.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Joaquín Salinas | joaquin.salinas@xitaso.com | +34 910 62 59 42
Key differentiator: Enables frictionless compliance with new European sustainability regulations (DPP). Broad Industry 4.0 expertise from IoT to digital twins to cybersecurity.

PROVIDER PROFILE: ACK LOGIC
Category: Automation & Industry 4.0 — Manufacturing Execution
Solutions: Gladdis Smed software, BATCH systems, MES (Manufacturing Execution System), electronic manufacturing guides (Paperless Factory).
Use cases: Paperless factory implementation, electronic batch records, optimisation of format changeover times, production order management, integration of SCADA/DCS with ERP.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: ERP, SCADA, DCS.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: N/E
Key differentiator: Strong specialisation in chemical, pharmaceutical and cosmetics manufacturing. Deep expertise in regulated batch production environments.

PROVIDER PROFILE: FUNDITEC
Category: Cybersecurity, Blockchain & AI — Industrial and Supply Chain
Solutions: Supply chain traceability with Smart Contracts (blockchain), OT/IoT cybersecurity, eco-sustainable packaging simulation via AI, anomaly detection in supplier networks.
Use cases: NIS2 compliance for connected manufacturing environments, immutable traceability of ingredients and raw materials, anomaly detection in supplier behaviour, eco-design optimisation for packaging, OT security for factories with IoT/SCADA.
Target company size: Medium to large (50+ employees)
Required digital maturity: Medium-High
Integration: ERP, MES, SCM via APIs.
Estimated investment: Medium-High
Certifications: NIS2 aligned, IEC 62443
Contact: Melany León | melany.leon@funditec.es | +34 628 929 508 | www.funditec.es
Key differentiator: Public-private collaboration model. Covers the full journey from POC to production. Unique combination of blockchain traceability + OT cybersecurity + AI in a single provider.

PROVIDER PROFILE: ÓRBITA INGENIERÍA
Category: Automation & Computer Vision — Packaging Quality Control
Solutions: Órbita Avisos (real-time plant notifications via Email/Telegram), computer vision system for dynamic label and packaging inspection.
Use cases: 360° visual inspection of all labels on cylindrical containers at production line speed, real-time defect notification to production supervisors, SCADA-integrated quality alerting.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: SCADA system (WinCC).
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: N/E
Key differentiator: 360° inspection of all labels on cylindrical packaging — a specific challenge in cosmetics and perfumery bottling lines. Real-time alert system via common messaging channels.

PROVIDER PROFILE: SETESUR
Category: IoT as a Service — Environmental and Industrial Monitoring
Solutions: IoT sensors as a service (50+ sensor catalog), Cloud platform, ML-based anomaly detection, environmental quality monitoring.
Use cases: Air and water quality monitoring in production environments, people/vehicle counting, industrial gas leak detection, real-time anomaly detection via machine learning, regulatory environmental compliance monitoring.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: Web and mobile platform.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Pedro Gea | pedro.gea@setesur.com | 619 871 947
Key differentiator: Integrated hardware + software in a single service contract. Catalog of 50+ IoT sensors covers virtually all industrial monitoring needs without multi-vendor complexity.

PROVIDER PROFILE: GMV
Category: Cybersecurity — Incident Response and Threat Intelligence
Solutions: GMV-CERT (Computer Emergency Response Team), SOAR (Security Orchestration Automation and Response), Threat Intelligence platform, penetration testing, security auditing.
Use cases: Security incident management and response, automated threat detection and containment, penetration testing for web and OT assets, NIS2 compliance readiness assessment, global threat intelligence for cosmetics sector.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: SIEM.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Javier Zubieta | Marketing.TIC@gmv.com
Key differentiator: Specialised global incident response team (GMV-CERT). Combines automated response (SOAR) with human expert escalation. Proven track record in critical infrastructure.

PROVIDER PROFILE: IRONTEC
Category: Cybersecurity & Cloud — Compliance and Managed Security
Solutions: CISO as a Service, EDR (Endpoint Detection and Response), SASE (Secure Access Service Edge), ZTNA (Zero Trust Network Access), DRP (Disaster Recovery Plan), DevSecOps, web auditing, penetration testing.
Use cases: NIS2 and ENS (Spanish National Security Framework) compliance, cloud security for AWS/Azure hybrid environments, human firewall activation (security awareness training), disaster recovery planning, continuous security posture management.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: AWS, Azure, hybrid cloud.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Inma González | igonzalez@irontec.com | +34 610 517 152
Key differentiator: Absolute technological neutrality — recommends best solution regardless of vendor. Proprietary methodological framework aligned with business objectives, not just technical compliance.

PROVIDER PROFILE: RANDSTAD DIGITAL
Category: Cybersecurity — SOC as a Service
Solutions: Semi-automated SOCaaS (Security Operations Centre as a Service), SIEM integration, 24x7 surveillance, compliance reporting, CAU (User Attention Centre) for first-level security incidents.
Use cases: Continuous 24x7 monitoring of security events, automated hardening of identified vulnerabilities, regulatory compliance reporting (NIS2, GDPR), incident classification and escalation, security awareness for non-technical staff.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: N/E
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 27001, ISO 45001
Contact: Natividad Vilela | Natividad.vilela@randstad.es | +34 673 582 872
Key differentiator: Semi-attended SOC model with CAU reduces cost vs fully-staffed SOC while maintaining 24x7 coverage. ISO 27001 certified — highest information security management standard.

PROVIDER PROFILE: EMBEBLUE
Category: Embedded Systems & IoT — Industrial Water Control
Solutions: Custom IoT hardware engineering, industrial connectivity solutions, water parameter control systems.
Use cases: Connectivity and real-time control of industrial water parameters (flow, pressure, quality), custom embedded hardware for specific industrial measurement needs.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: N/E
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Javier Hualde | jhualde@embeblue.com | 664 660 807
Key differentiator: Custom hardware engineering for specific industrial IoT needs — fills the gap where off-the-shelf sensors are insufficient for specialised water management applications in cosmetics.

PROVIDER PROFILE: BARBARA
Category: Edge Computing & Industrial MLOps
Solutions: Barbara OS (industrial edge operating system), MLOps at the edge, dockerised deployment on plant hardware, virtual predictive meters.
Use cases: Deployment of AI/ML models directly on plant hardware without sending data to cloud, creation of virtual predictive meters from existing sensor data, edge-based anomaly detection, OPC-UA and MQTT integration for existing SCADA systems.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: OPC-UA, MQTT, Node-RED.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: N/E
Key differentiator: MLOps capabilities at the edge without requiring critical production data to leave the plant. Dockerised deployment enables rapid iteration of AI models on existing industrial hardware.

PROVIDER PROFILE: CODE CONTRACT
Category: Blockchain — Traceability and Quality Certification
Solutions: Certified digital twin with blockchain, immutable quality and origin certification, water traceability systems.
Use cases: Guarantee of ingredient and raw material origin, immutable water quality certification (for COSM-EAU type applications), supply chain traceability for regulatory compliance, reputational risk mitigation through transparent provenance records.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: Data Science web apps, Cloud.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Sergio Gallastegi | sergio@codecontract.io
Key differentiator: Immutable blockchain-based traceability eliminates fraud and error risk in supply chain documentation. Specific application to water quality certification — directly relevant to COSM-EAU water management projects.

PROVIDER PROFILE: MYTRA
Category: SCADA Integration — Critical Infrastructure Unification
Solutions: Unification of isolated industrial control systems (Netin, Sinaut, VersionDog) into a single integrated SCADA platform with SIEM connectivity.
Use cases: Integration of fragmented SCADA/DCS systems across production sites, unified visibility of critical infrastructure, SIEM integration for security monitoring of OT environments, reduction of operational silos in multi-site cosmetics manufacturing.
Target company size: N/E
Required digital maturity: N/E
Integration: SCADA, SIEM.
Estimated investment: N/E
Certifications: N/E
Contact: Igor Navascues | inavascues@mytra.es | 608 70 77 39
Key differentiator: Specialises in unifying previously isolated critical infrastructures — addresses the specific challenge of cosmetics manufacturers operating multiple incompatible legacy SCADA systems.
